name: Hue Rice- Com Huong Giang
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the cold rice with wet hands to separate the grains. Set aside.
2. Soak the dried shrimp in hot water for 30 minutes. Drain.
3. Remove the outer leaves from lemon grass, trim, and mince.
4. Grind together the shrimp, lemon grass, shallots, garlic, sugar, and chilies.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or skillet. Add the scallions and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the lemon grass and dried shrimp mixture and stir-fry for 5 minutes over high heat. Remove to a dish.
7. Pour the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil into the wok. Add the onion and stir-fry until translucent.
8. Add the rice and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
9. Stir in the broth, fish sauce, and black pepper to taste. Add the lemon grass and shrimp mixture and the toasted sesame seeds. Stir to combine well.
10. Transfer to a heated platter. Sprinkle with additional black pepper and garnish with the coriander sprigs. Serve with Nuoc Cham (Lime sauce).
